SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain

Class DebottleneckingAdvisor.DebottleneckCandidate

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.optimization.valuechain.DebottleneckingAdvisor.DebottleneckCandidate
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
DebottleneckingAdvisor
public static class DebottleneckingAdvisor.DebottleneckCandidate extends Object implements Serializable
A candidate debottlenecking investment.

  • Field Details

    • serialVersionUID

      private static final long serialVersionUID
      Serialization version identifier.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • name

      private final String name
      Descriptive name of the upgrade (e.g. "Larger tubing on Well-1").

    • targetEquipment

      private final String targetEquipment
      Name of the equipment the upgrade targets.

    • capexNok

      private final double capexNok
      Capital cost of the upgrade in the configured currency.

    • firstYear

      private final int firstYear
      First year (inclusive) the upgrade starts unlocking value.

    • lastYear

      private final int lastYear
      Last year (inclusive) the upgrade continues unlocking value.

    • annualIncrementalValueNok

      private final double annualIncrementalValueNok
      Incremental value unlocked by the upgrade, in currency per year.

    • constraint

      private final CapacityConstraint constraint
      Optional live constraint the upgrade relaxes (may be null).

  • Constructor Details

    • DebottleneckCandidate

      public DebottleneckCandidate(String name, String targetEquipment, double capexNok, int firstYear, int lastYear, double annualIncrementalValueNok, CapacityConstraint constraint)
      Creates a debottlenecking candidate.
      Parameters:
      name - descriptive name of the upgrade
      targetEquipment - name of the equipment the upgrade targets
      capexNok - capital cost in the configured currency (non-negative)
      firstYear - first year (inclusive) the upgrade starts unlocking value (>= 0)
      lastYear - last year (inclusive) the upgrade continues unlocking value (>= firstYear)
      annualIncrementalValueNok - incremental value unlocked in currency per year
      constraint - optional live constraint the upgrade relaxes; may be null

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the descriptive name of the upgrade.
      Returns:
      the upgrade name

    • getTargetEquipment

      public String getTargetEquipment()
      Gets the target equipment name.
      Returns:
      the target equipment name

    • getCapexNok

      public double getCapexNok()
      Gets the capital cost of the upgrade.
      Returns:
      capital cost in the configured currency

    • getFirstYear

      public int getFirstYear()
      Gets the first year the upgrade unlocks value.
      Returns:
      the first year (inclusive)

    • getLastYear

      public int getLastYear()
      Gets the last year the upgrade unlocks value.
      Returns:
      the last year (inclusive)

    • getAnnualIncrementalValueNok

      public double getAnnualIncrementalValueNok()
      Gets the incremental annual value unlocked by the upgrade.
      Returns:
      incremental value in currency per year

    • getConstraint

      public CapacityConstraint getConstraint()
      Gets the live constraint the upgrade relaxes.
      Returns:
      the constraint, or null if none was supplied
